summary: Fair matrix recording with decent clarity, featuring a standout Cassidy and a solid Brokedown Palace amidst an above‑average shoulder show.
review: The performance sits in the middle of a strong New Year's Eve run – it opens tight with Jack Straw and hits its peak early on with a superb Cassidy, then delivers a nice Eyes of the World sync before losing steam after Lost Sailor. Recording-wise the miller_81601 soundboard source is clear but has abrupt cuts, while the audience‑only second‑set track needs EQ and slight pitch correction, making the overall listenable yet imperfect.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review shows a mix of positive musical moments and technical shortcomings; weighted average yields a solid‑above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: First set from miller_81601 (soundboard) is clear but has abrupt tuning cuts; second set from severson_miller_clugston (audience) lacks upper mids and runs slightly slow, requiring +1% pitch correction and EQ.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A short, sweet first set that peaks early with Cassidy; a second set that starts strong (China Cat → Rider → Eyes of the World) but tapers after Lost Sailor, ending on a decent encore.
